test:case.test:description: Order-of-application: shape-side fillRef child carries its own transforms (shade 80000 on accent1). The fillRef idx="2" points to fmtScheme/fillStyleLst[2] stop 0, whose phClr template carries lumMod 110000 + satMod 105000 + tint 67000. Resolution order: 1) resolve accent1 → #156082 2) apply shape-side transforms in document order → injected as phClr 3) apply theme-side transforms in document order → final color
